about_page.meta_title: About Us - Edilquadro | Construction Company Rome
about_page.meta_description: Discover Edilquadro: a construction company in Rome's Tuscolana area with over 25 years of experience in home, shop, and building renovations. Qualified team and 200+ completed projects.
about_page.title: About Us
about_page.subtitle: For over 25 years, Edilquadro has been the trusted partner for renovations in Rome. Based in the Tuscolana area, our team of qualified professionals transforms spaces into unique environments.
about_page.story_p1: Edilquadro was founded in 1998, born from Stylianos Kountalis's passion for construction and renovation. Starting as a small artisan company in Rome's Tuscolana area, we built our reputation project after project, caring for every detail with dedication and professionalism.
about_page.story_p2: Over the years, we expanded our team and expertise, becoming a full-service construction company capable of managing projects of any size: from single apartment renovations to the restoration of entire buildings and residential complexes.
about_page.story_p3: Today, Edilquadro operates throughout Rome and its province, with a portfolio of over 200 successfully completed projects and a consolidated network of professionals, architects, and designers who collaborate to offer tailor-made solutions to our clients.
about_page.value1_desc: We use only top-quality materials and cutting-edge construction techniques. Every project undergoes rigorous quality checks.
about_page.value2_desc: Detailed quotes, fixed timelines, and constant communication. With us, you always know what to expect, with no surprises.
about_page.value3_desc: Careful planning and efficient site management. We are committed to meeting the deadlines agreed upon with our clients.
about_page.value4_desc: We guide you from start to finish: design, permits, construction, and after-work support. One point of contact for everything.
about_page.area_desc: Our headquarters is in the Tuscolana area of Rome, but we operate across the entire city and province. From apartment renovations in the historic center to work on villas and residential complexes in surrounding municipalities.
about_page.cta_subtitle: Contact us for a free site visit and a personalized quote. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

tuscolana.intro_p2: For over 25 years we have served residents and business owners in the area with quality renovations, reliable timelines, and transparent quotes. Our proximity allows for quick site visits and immediate assistance during work.

bonus_page.meta_description: Complete guide to renovation tax benefits in Italy 2026: 50% renovation bonus, 65% ecobonus, sismabonus, facade bonus. Edilquadro handles paperwork and construction in Rome.
bonus_page.subtitle: All the tax bonuses and deductions available for home renovation, energy efficiency improvement, and property renewal in Rome.
bonus_page.intro_p1: 2026 still offers significant opportunities for those looking to renovate their property while taking advantage of tax deductions provided by law. From construction renovation bonuses to energy efficiency incentives, the savings opportunities are concrete and substantial.
bonus_page.intro_p2: Edilquadro, with over 25 years of renovation experience in Rome, guides you in choosing the most suitable bonus for your project and manages all the necessary documentation. We accompany you from the feasibility analysis to the completion of works, ensuring you obtain every available tax benefit.
bonus_page.bonus_ristrutturazione_desc: 50% IRPEF deduction on building renovation expenses, spread over 10 years. Valid for extraordinary maintenance, restoration, conservative rehabilitation, and renovation of individual property units.
bonus_page.bonus_ristrutturazione_works: Bathroom renovation, kitchen, electrical and plumbing systems, partition walls, flooring, windows.
bonus_page.bonus_ecobonus_desc: Deductions for energy efficiency improvements: from 50% for windows and solar shading, to 65% for condensing boilers, heat pumps, and thermal insulation.
bonus_page.bonus_ecobonus_works: Window replacement, condensing boiler installation, heat pump, thermal insulation, solar panels.
bonus_page.bonus_sismabonus_desc: Deduction from 50% to 85% for seismic safety interventions on buildings in seismic risk zones 1, 2, and 3. Also includes interventions combining seismic risk reduction and energy efficiency.
bonus_page.bonus_sismabonus_works: Structural consolidation, pillar and beam reinforcement, seismic upgrading, foundation work.
bonus_page.bonus_facciata_desc: 60% deduction for recovery and restoration work on building facades. Includes cleaning, painting, and work on balconies, ornaments, and friezes.
bonus_page.bonus_facciata_works: Facade plastering, external painting, balcony restoration, cornices and gutters.
bonus_page.bonus_verde_desc: 36% IRPEF deduction on expenses for landscaping open areas, creating gardens, terraces, and irrigation systems.
bonus_page.bonus_verde_works: Gardens, green terraces, irrigation systems, green roofs, wells.
bonus_page.bonus_barriere_desc: 75% deduction for interventions aimed at overcoming and eliminating architectural barriers. Valid for existing buildings.
bonus_page.bonus_barriere_works: Elevator installation, freight lifts, ramps, automatic doors, disabled bathroom adaptation.
bonus_page.help_title: How We Help with Tax Bonuses
bonus_page.help_step1_desc: We visit your property to assess the necessary work and identify the applicable bonuses for your specific case.
bonus_page.help_step2_desc: We provide a clear quote indicating the cost of works, the deductible amount, and the actual tax savings.
bonus_page.help_step3_desc: We handle all necessary documentation: CILA/SCIA permits, energy certifications, ENEA communications, and traceable payments.
bonus_page.help_step4_desc: We carry out the work to the highest standards and deliver all documentation needed for your tax return.
bonus_page.faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions about Tax Bonuses
bonus_page.faq1_q: Can I use multiple bonuses for the same property?
bonus_page.faq1_a: Yes, it is possible to combine different bonuses for the same property, provided the works are different and expenses do not overlap. For example, you can use the renovation bonus for the bathroom and the ecobonus for windows.
bonus_page.faq2_q: How does payment work to obtain the tax deduction?
bonus_page.faq2_a: Payments must be made via a 'talking bank transfer' (bonifico parlante), which states the payment reason, the beneficiary's tax code, and the company's VAT number. Edilquadro guides you through every step.
bonus_page.faq3_q: Do I need to submit a building permit for the bonuses?
bonus_page.faq3_a: It depends on the type of work. For extraordinary maintenance, a CILA is required; for structural work, a SCIA. We handle the submission to the relevant Municipality.
bonus_page.faq4_q: Does Edilquadro handle the ENEA paperwork for the ecobonus?
bonus_page.faq4_a: Yes, we handle the ENEA communication within 90 days of work completion, including all necessary technical documentation (APE energy certificates, technical data sheets, etc.).
bonus_page.faq5_q: How long does it take to recover the tax deduction?
bonus_page.faq5_a: Deductions are spread over 10 equal annual installments in your tax return (730 or Modello Redditi). The savings begin from the first year after the works are completed.
bonus_page.cta_subtitle: Contact us for a free site visit: we'll analyze your case and identify the available bonuses for your project.
